data.title: Rockwell Automation to power Lucid's EV facility in Saudi Arabia with software solutions. Supporting Vision 2030. Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. is set to provide FactoryTalk® MES and on-site assistance to bolster the production of electric vehicles (EVs) and enhance workforce training in support of Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030. The initiative is taking place in DAMMAM, Saudi Arabia and was announced on January 21, 2026. As per the New York Stock Exchange, Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is recognized as the leading global entity specializing in industrial automation. This strategic collaboration aims to align manufacturing processes with the objectives of Vision 2030, demonstrating a commitment to advancing the EV sector in the region.

data.title: Lendable raises $500M with first close of two blended-finance funds, achieves rare investment-grade rating.
data.description: Lendable, a prominent provider of asset-backed credit to rapidly expanding companies worldwide, has announced the initial closing of its two new blended-finance funds. With this development, the company is advancing towards raising a significant sum of $500 million. Additionally, they have achieved a rare feat by securing an investment-grade rating.

data.title: German companies are increasingly using public cloud services for AI, as shown in growing AI deployments, ISG reports.
data.description: In Germany, enterprises are increasingly embracing cloud services tailored for artificial intelligence (AI) tasks to accommodate the rising number of AI implementations. According to ISG, this strategic shift reflects a growing trend towards leveraging specialized cloud solutions for AI workloads among businesses in the region.

data.title: Winklevoss twins donate $1.4M to support Zcash for privacy, calling it "unstoppable private money."
data.description: The founders of Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI), Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, recently made a significant contribution of over $1 million towards the Zcash cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: ZEC). The donation, consisting of 3,221 ZEC tokens valued at $1.4 million, was offered to Shielded Labs - a group striving to advance the Zcash network independently. Cameron Winklevoss praised Zcash as "unstoppable private money" and emphasized their dedication to supporting its cause. He further highlighted the importance of privacy in the cryptocurrency realm, asserting that it marks the frontier where individual freedom and self-sovereignty prevail over government and corporate interference. This news can be explored further on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global polyurethane foam market volume to reach 19.61 Mn tons by 2031, growing at 4.31% CAGR, as per Mordor Intelligence.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 21, 2026, a recent report from Mordor Intelligence indicates substantial growth in the global polyurethane foam market. The report forecasts a rise in market volume from around 15.88 million tons in 2026 to close to 19.61 million tons by 2031. This projection suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.31% over the specified period.

data.title: VOX Solutions partners with VIVA Bolivia to launch True Signal, a Telco-powered performance model. Exciting innovation in advertising tech.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 21, 2026, VOX Solutions, a prominent TelcoTech company offering advertising-technology and data monetization solutions, proudly disclosed that VIVA Bolivia, a cutting-edge mobile network operator in the country, has decided to implement True Signal by VOX for its services.

data.title: Nansen introduces AI crypto trading tools on Base and Solana, using natural language processing for execution.
data.description: The latest crypto trading platforms, powered by artificial intelligence, strive to revolutionize traditional trading methods by providing trading execution using natural language processing. These platforms aim to streamline the trading process by eliminating the need for traditional trading charts and order books. The technology behind these platforms allows investors to engage in trading activities using human-like communication rather than technical analysis. This advancement is expected to attract a significant number of users looking for a more intuitive and user-friendly trading experience.

data.title: Economist predicts shift to small-cap, value stocks driven by economic resilience. Large growth stocks drop 10-12% in latest rotation. Fed policy and earnings momentum support new market trend.
data.description: Investors are focusing beyond inflated headlines, leading a significant shift in the market. Professor Jeremy Siegel notes a sustainable trend towards small-cap and value stocks, driven by economic resilience and Federal Reserve policy. This shift is evident as there is a noticeable move away from large growth stocks, with a 10% to 12% pullback in large-cap growth relative to value stocks. Professor Siegel believes this rotation is more enduring than previous fluctuations. Small-cap stocks are gaining momentum, with Siegel stating that they don't need substantial earnings growth to perform well. He emphasizes that as long as earnings stabilize and the Fed continues its current direction, small-caps are poised for leadership in the market. The resilience of the market is overcoming inflationary distractions, paving the way for a healthier market advancement. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
